'''Bado Karpa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who worked for [[Meeko Ghintee]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was wanted by [[Rozatta]] for stealing her [[Fuel cell/Legends|fuel cell]] shipments. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 credits dead, and was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] on [[Outland Transit Station]].
